nobody had more extreme superstitions

meta.title: Why Superstitions Are Good For You
meta.description:
What do Ponce De Leon, Alexander The Great and Jason Giambi all have in common? 

Superstitions.

What are superstitions? Why do we believe them?

Although there are a lot of weird superstitions out there, there may be psychological benefits to believing them.

Let's find out why.


----
Thank you Patreon members: Jim H, Daniel M, Mauricio CT, EW Coffey, B Hendley, Stella R, Sal C, Dalton R, J Gasper, Aaron C, Jacob S, Christy & Erik A, Steve Spencer, Hockey, Kalmar, Moon Raker, Patrick I, Mikey2ky, Laura G, All CA Reptile Girl, Uncle Michael, B Ness, Robin Lotz, Grace Cupcake, Lost Pilot, S Victory, Trippy Trev, Miketpi, Aaron K, Manumelita N, Paul W
